keywords.title: Keywords
keywords.description: List of search keywords. Each is searched separately and results are merged.

location.title: Location
location.description: Location passed to SEEK's where param.

dateRange.title: Date Range (days)
dateRange.description: Only return jobs listed within this many days. 999 = all time.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum total results across all keywords. SEEK hard cap is 550.
